content.en:
"Maybe I would have been better off leaving the Void in the first place!

The First Patriarch thought to himself.

Once upon a time, he was the second only existence in the Void Domain to the First Demon Venerable!

But now, his strength is not worth mentioning in the human race, and he is not ranked at all, and he can beat him by pulling out a human powerhouse at will.

However, after thinking about it carefully, he still forgot it, since he cultivated the Qingyuan Dao Seed and was seized by the Qingyuan Country Lord, his foundation has been seriously damaged, and now he can return to the Eternal Dao Realm to cultivate and become a weakened Eternal Dao Realm, which is already the limit.

No matter how much he improved after that, it was useless, and it was impossible for him to cultivate the Eternal Dao Seed again.

Moreover, even the Qingyuan Country Lord was tormented by the demonization problem of the Eternal Dao Seed, and the fate of his Eternal Dao Realm would only be worse.

"I'll just stay in the void domain honestly, what's the problem, human beings are on top, I just have to live a good life in peace, I'm bored, I seal myself. The First Senator thought to himself.

Of course.

Many patriarchs and forces still want to get out of the Void Realm, they feel that the human race can become so powerful, even if they are a little worse, they can be promoted to a similar level.

So, they begged the Terrans to take them out.

As a result, the Terrans26 ignored them at all.

As a result, many forces had hatred, and some mythical Dao realms even wanted to smuggle in the past, and were directly executed by the high-level of the human race.

Of course, if these forces don't cause trouble, humans won't care.

Moreover, there are no foreign enemies in the Void Realm today, and if they don't cause trouble, their lives are also very comfortable.

Therefore, under the strength of human beings, they completely gave up this plan.

The years passed.

Human beings are developing faster and faster, and the population is expanding.

And after Ye Tian let go of the Eternal State Order, more and more Eternal Dao Realms exchanged for the Eternal State Order, opened up the Eternal Realm, and made the Endless Realm Alliance more and more Eternal Realms.

......

this day.

In the Endless Kingdom and Star Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods Alliance, Ye Tian began to move the human beings here and bring them all into the Endless Kingdom Alliance, completely abandoning these two eternal kingdoms.

In a single breath, all the humans of the two eternal kingdoms were relocated, and everything was taken with them.

This news was quickly sensed by the other forces of the two kingdoms, and they were puzzled one by one, and some of them were also sent to Ye Tian by the Eternal Dao Realm, wanting to know what was going on.

And Ye Tian's reply was to move away, and gave the two Eternal Kingdom Decrees to other forces.

And with Ye Tian's departure, many Eternal Dao Realms panicked!

After all, there is still a demon seed in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, in case the Demon Seed Abyss comes out, who can stop it?

Now, there is only one half-step Eternal Realm God Realm left in the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, and that is the Tai Chi Dao Master.

With only a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, how could he beat the Demon Seed Abyss?

However, they didn't know that the Demon Seed Lin Yuan was dead, and the Tai Chi Dao Master didn't know either.

Thereupon.

After the Tai Chi Dao Master learned that Ye Tian had left, he ran away without saying a word, he didn't want to face the Demon Seed Linyuan!

The Tai Chi Daoist himself has no power, and he is not the master of the country, so there is no pressure to run.

As a result, the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance did not even have a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Once upon a time, the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance had an Eternal Realm God Realm, several half-step Eternal Realm God Realms, how powerful they were.

With the current strength of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, how can it stop the Demon Seed Abyss of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss?

All of a sudden, many Eternal Dao Realms panicked, and the Nine Extremes Alliance didn't know what to do?

The key is that it is impossible for the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods to manage the current Alliance of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, after all, even the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods has been relocated to the realm of the Realm of Gods, and the Lord of the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods has nothing to do with here!

Many Eternal Dao Realms wanted to escape, but the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance, which was closest to the Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance, was in a worse situation than the Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance, so they couldn't go there.

And if you want to go to other countries and alliances, it is too far away, there are many dangers on the way, and there is also a danger of falling.

Therefore, it is better to simply stay in the Kingdom of the Gods Alliance.

If the Demon Seed Lin Abyss rushed out of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, they would choose to run away.

Of course.

Ye Tian still gave the high-level of the Nine Extremes Alliance a contact information, if the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance really encountered trouble, they could contact him.

When Ye Tian first entered the Eternal Kingdom Realm, he was in the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, if there was no Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, he would not have been able to survive a period of safety safely, and it would be impossible for him to grow to this point.

Therefore, if the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods is in danger, he will still take action.

However, the demon seed Lin Yuan is already dead, and for the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, there is actually not much danger, unless a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm demon seed is born, but such a demon seed is difficult to be born.

......

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, gradually completed the solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed, after all, Ye Tian gave the White Pole Xuanye and the Xuanlin Ancient Vine to his wife, and let his wife solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and the efficiency naturally improved a lot.

And Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Seed is not as powerful as him, so it is easier to complete the complete 460 solidification.

No, on this day, Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Seed was completely solidified.

Subsequently.

Xiao Yue began to impact the Eternal Realm God Realm, and she also broke through very easily, becoming the second Eternal Realm God Realm of the Endless Realm Alliance.

After that, Ye Xingchen, Xiao Yue gave him the White Pole Xuanye and the Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

After a relatively long period of time, Ye Xingchen also completed the solidification of the Eternal Dao Species, began to impact the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, and also successfully broke through, and his strength skyrocketed many times.

Then, it was Ye Xingyue who completed the solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed, and then broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

At this point, the Endless Realm Alliance has four Eternal Realm God Realms.

In the next long years, there will be no Eternal Realm God Realm in the Endless Realm Alliance, at least it will take a long time to be born.

......

"It's been a long time since my cultivation broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, it's time to join the Realm Court!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Realm Court is the most powerful alliance force in the Eternal Realm and even in the Realm God Realm, and only by joining the Realm Court can he obtain complete inheritance knowledge, otherwise the next cultivation can only be explored by himself step by step.

Therefore, joining the Realm Court is the best choice.

So on this day, he traveled to the Realm Division of the Eternal Realm.
